---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report maintenance or housekeeping tasks
title: 'Maintenance: '
labels: 'maintenance, needs-triage'
assignees: ''

---

**Type of maintenance**
- [ ] Code cleanup
- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Security updates
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Description**
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

**Expected outcome**
What should be the result after this maintenance is completed?

**Priority**
- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
- [ ] Critical

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
